---
title: "Slides"
author: "Tommaso Feraco"
#include-in-header: assets/header.html
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: true   
    toc-depth: 3 
    toc-expand: 3 
    code-fold: false 
    message: false
#    css: "assets/custom.css"
editor: visual
---

Here I publicly store presentations by topic:

## Social, emotional, and behavioral skills

-   **SEB skills and specific learning disabilities** - [Departmental talk](https://feracotommaso.github.io/Slides/SEB_SLD/SebSldPresentation2.html){target="_blank"}
-   **SEB skills and self-regulated learning frameworks** - [ARP](https://feracotommaso.github.io/Slides/SEB_SRL/ARP_seb_srl_slides.html) ([pdf](https://feracotommaso.github.io/Slides/SEB_SRL/ARP_seb_srl_slides.pdf)); [ISSID](https://feracotommaso.github.io/Slides/SEB_SRL/ISSID/ISSID_seb_srl_slides.html)
-   **SEB skills in adolescence and change goals** - [YLC presentation](https://feracotommaso.github.io/Slides/YLC/YLC_slides.html) ([pdf](https://feracotommaso.github.io/Slides/YLC/YLC_slides.pdf))
-   **The Living SEB project** - [IBT](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/slides/IBTcolloquium/IBTcolloquium.html#/title-slide); [Lab meeting](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/slides/labMeeting/LabMeetingLMA.html)

## Methods

-   **Clusters that are not there -** [Psicostat meeting](https://psicostat.dpss.psy.unipd.it/meetings/slides/2024-03-08_feraco.pdf)
-   **SEMbeddings** - [handZone](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/slides/SEMbeddingSlides.pdf)
-   **Latent interaction** - [handZone](https://feracotommaso.github.io/SEM-phd-course/extras/ex03_latent-interactions_modsem.html#/title-slide)
-   **EFA-PCA-CFA** - [handZone](https://feracotommaso.github.io/SEM-phd-course/extras/ex_pca-efa-cfa_overview.html#/title-slide)

## Geographical variability

-   **Geographical variability of test anxiety** - [ECP 26](https://feracotommaso.github.io/Slides/fis/ecp26.html)

::: {style="font-size:11px;"}
GitHub repository: <https://github.com/feracotommaso/Slides>

Many thanks to Filippo Gambarota and Enrico Toffalini for sharing their expertise in using GitHub, Quarto, and creating GitHub Pages websites.
:::
